title: FCDO ministerial travel and meetings
body: "The Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office publishes details of ministers’ meetings with external organisations and overseas travel every 3 months.   For earlier data see:    FCDO ministerial gifts, hospitality, travel and meetings data (October 2020 to September 2024)  FCO ministerial gifts, hospitality, travel and meetings data (up to September 2020)  DFID ministerial gifts, hospitality, travel and meetings data (up to September 2020)   "
